base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_doors_6_variants — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 metroid. 6 door types — 1: Basic (blue). 2/3/4: Orange/blue/pink variants (rocket-opened. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 6 door types — 1: Basic (blue). 2/3/4: Orange/blue/pink variants (rocket-opened; pink if Samus Suitless). 5: Ridley's Lair only. 6: Tourian only. Detailed annotation on sheet
